testcase.name: test_package_lock_contains_lucide_1250_peer_react_19_support
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_install_build_pipeline_regression.py:32: in test_package_lock_contains_lucide_1250_peer_react_19_support assert lucide["version"] == "1.25.0" E AssertionError: assert '0.468.0' == '1.25.0' E E - 1.25.0 E + 0.468.0

testcase.name: test_vercel_uses_clean_install_build_web_and_dist_output

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'npm install ...--no-progress' == 'npm ci'
- npm ci + npm install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund --no-progress

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_install_build_pipeline_regression.py:39: in test_vercel_uses_clean_install_build_web_and_dist_output assert vercel["installCommand"] == "npm ci" E AssertionError: assert 'npm install ...--no-progress' == 'npm ci' E E - npm ci E + npm install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund --no-progress

testcase.name: test_workflow_uses_node22_npm_ci_lint_and_build_web

failure.message:
assert 'run: npm ci' in 'name: Install and Build

on:
 pull_request:
 push:
 branches: [main, master]
 workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
 contents: read

jobs:
 clean-install-and-build:
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Baixar código
 uses: actions/checkout@v4

 - name: Configurar Node.js
 uses: actions/setup-node@v4
 with:
 node-version: 22
 cache: npm

 - name: Instalação de dependências
 run: |
 if npm ci --legacy-peer-deps 2>/dev/null; then
 echo "npm ci concluído com o lock file existente."
 else
 echo "Lock file fora de sincronia; realizando 'npm install' para regenerar." >&2
 npm install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund --no-progress
 fi

 - name: Verificar lint
 run: npm run lint

 - name: Exportar web
 run: npm run build:web'

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_install_build_pipeline_regression.py:48: in test_workflow_uses_node22_npm_ci_lint_and_build_web assert "run: npm ci" in workflow E assert 'run: npm ci' in 'name: Install and Build

on:
 pull_request:
 push:
 branches: [main, master]
 workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
 contents: read

jobs:
 clean-install-and-build:
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Baixar código
 uses: actions/checkout@v4

 - name: Configurar Node.js
 uses: actions/setup-node@v4
 with:
 node-version: 22
 cache: npm

 - name: Instalação de dependências
 run: |
 if npm ci --legacy-peer-deps 2>/dev/null; then
 echo "npm ci concluído com o lock file existente."
 else
 echo "Lock file fora de sincronia; realizando 'npm install' para regenerar." >&2
 npm install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund --no-progress
 fi

 - name: Verificar lint
 run: npm run lint

 - name: Exportar web
 run: npm run build:web'

testcase.name: test_no_legacy_peer_deps_or_force_workarounds_in_release_files
